title: Slovakian Shrimp Skewers
description: Grilled shrimp skewers with a crunchy Slovakian crumbly topping, perfect for a summer evening.
instructions: Thread shrimp onto skewers, leaving a small space between each shrimp.
In a small bowl, mix together Slovakian crumbly, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the mixture evenly onto both sides of the shrimp.
Grill the shrimp for 2-3 minutes per side, or until pink and cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast the charred tagliere on the grill for 1-2 minutes on each side.
Serve the grilled shrimp skewers with toasted tagliere on top.
Garnish with fresh parsley, if desired.
